1.name: Illiteracy
1.description: Barbarians are illiterate unless they spend two skill points or take a level in a literate class.

1.name: Rage 1/day
1.description: 1/day, +4 Con, +4 Str, +2 Will saves, -2 AC. Fatigued after 3+Constitution Modifier rounds.

2.name: Uncanny dodge
2.description: Retain Dexterity bonus to AC even if caught flat-footed.

3.name: Trap sense +1
3.description: +1 bonus on Reflex saves and AC against traps.

4.name: Rage 2/day
4.description: 2/day, +4 Con, +4 Str, +2 Will saves, -2 AC. Fatigued after 3+Constitution Modifier rounds.

5.name: Improved uncanny dodge
5.description: Cannot be flanked; sneak attacks only from rogues 4+ levels higher.

6.name: Trap sense +2
6.description: +2 bonus on Reflex saves and AC against traps.

7.name: Damage reduction 1/—
7.description: Subtract 1 point of damage from any melee or ranged attack.

8.name: Rage 3/day
8.description: 3/day, +4 Con, +4 Str, +2 Will saves, -2 AC. Fatigued after 3+Constitution Modifier rounds.

9.name: Trap sense +3
9.description: +3 bonus on Reflex saves and AC against traps.

10.name: Damage reduction 2/—
10.description: Subtract 2 points of damage from any melee or ranged attack.

11.name: Greater rage
11.description: Rage bonuses increase to +6 Str, +6 Con, +3 Will saves.

12.name: Rage 4/day
12.description: 4/day, +6 Con, +6 Str, +3 Will saves, -2 AC. Greater rage.

12.name: Trap sense +4
12.description: +4 bonus on Reflex saves and AC against traps.

13.name: Damage reduction 3/—
13.description: Subtract 3 points of damage from any melee or ranged attack.

14.name: Indomitable will
14.description: +4 bonus on Will saves against enchantments while raging.

15.name: Trap sense +5
15.description: +5 bonus on Reflex saves and AC against traps.

16.name: Damage reduction 4/—
16.description: Subtract 4 points of damage from any melee or ranged attack.

16.name: Rage 5/day
16.description: 5/day, +6 Con, +6 Str, +3 Will saves, -2 AC. Greater rage.

17.name: Tireless rage
17.description: No longer fatigued after rage ends.

18.name: Trap sense +6
18.description: +6 bonus on Reflex saves and AC against traps.

19.name: Damage reduction 5/—
19.description: Subtract 5 points of damage from any melee or ranged attack.

20.name: Mighty rage
20.description: Rage bonuses increase to +8 Str, +8 Con, +4 Will saves.

20.name: Rage 6/day
20.description: 6/day, +8 Con, +8 Str, +4 Will saves, -2 AC. Mighty rage.

1.name: Bardic music
1.description: Use song or poetics to produce magical effects.

1.name: Bardic knowledge
1.description: Add level + Int modifier to bardic knowledge checks.

1.name: Countersong
1.description: Counter magical effects that depend on sound.

1.name: Fascinate
1.description: Fascinate a creature with music or poetics.

3.name: Inspire competence
3.description: +2 competence bonus on skill checks for an ally.

6.name: Suggestion
6.description: Make a suggestion to a fascinated creature.

9.name: Inspire greatness
9.description: Grant bonus hit dice, +2 attack, +1 Fort save.

12.name: Song of freedom
12.description: Create a break enchantment effect with 1 minute of song.

15.name: Inspire heroics
15.description: +4 morale bonus on saves and dodge bonus to AC.

18.name: Mass suggestion
18.description: Make a suggestion to any number of fascinated creatures.

1.name: Aura
1.description: A cleric of a chaotic, evil, good, or lawful deity has a particularly powerful aura corresponding to the deity's alignment.

1.name: Animal companion
1.description: A druid may begin play with an animal companion. (Stub)

1.name: Nature sense
1.description: A druid gains a +2 bonus on Knowledge (nature) and Survival checks.

1.name: Wild empathy
1.description: A druid can improve the attitude of an animal.

2.name: Woodland stride
2.description: A druid may move through any sort of undergrowth at her normal speed and without taking damage or suffering any other impairment.

3.name: Trackless step
3.description: A druid leaves no trail in natural surroundings and cannot be tracked.

4.name: Resist nature's lure
4.description: A druid gains a +4 bonus on saving throws against the spell-like abilities of fey.

5.name: Wild shape (1/day)
5.description: A druid gains the ability to turn herself into any Small or Medium animal and back again once per day.

9.name: Venom immunity
9.description: A druid gains immunity to all poisons.

13.name: A thousand faces
13.description: A druid gains the ability to change her appearance at will, as if using the disguise self spell.

15.name: Timeless body
15.description: A druid no longer takes ability score penalties for aging and cannot be magically aged.

15.name: Wild shape (Huge)
15.description: Wild shape 5/day, Huge, Large, Tiny, Plant.

16.name: Wild shape (elemental 1/day)
16.description: Wild shape 5/day, Huge, Large, Tiny, Plant, Elemental 1/day.

18.name: Wild shape (6/day)
18.description: Wild shape 6/day, Huge, Large, Tiny, Plant, Elemental 2/day.

20.name: Wild shape (elemental 3/day, Huge elemental)
20.description: Wild shape 6/day, Huge, Large, Tiny, Plant, Elemental 3/day (Huge).

1.name: Healing Hands
1.description: Add Charisma modifier to all curative healing spells.

3.name: Cleanse paralysis
3.description: 1/day, remove paralysis from a creature with a touch.

4.name: Cleanse disease
4.description: 1/day, remove disease from a creature with a touch.

5.name: Cleanse fear
5.description: 1/day, remove fear from a creature with a touch.

6.name: Cleanse poison
6.description: 1/day, neutralize poison from a creature with a touch.

7.name: Effortless healing
7.description: Cast conjuration (healing) spells without provoking attacks of opportunity.

9.name: Cleanse blindness
9.description: 1/day, cure blindness or deafness in a creature with a touch.

10.name: Cleanse spirit
10.description: 1/day, restore ability points or remove negative levels with a touch.

15.name: New limb
15.description: 1/day, regrow a lost limb on a creature with a touch.

20.name: New life
20.description: 1/day, resurrect a deceased creature with a touch.

1.name: Flurry of blows
1.description: When unarmored, a monk may strike with a flurry of blows at the expense of accuracy.

1.name: Unarmed strike
1.description: A monk gains Improved Unarmed Strike as a bonus feat. A monk may apply her full Strength bonus on damage rolls for all her unarmed strikes.

1.name: AC Bonus
1.description: When unarmored and unencumbered, the monk adds her Wisdom bonus (if any) to her AC.

2.name: Evasion
2.description: If a monk makes a successful Reflex saving throw against an attack that normally deals half damage on a successful save, she instead takes no damage.

3.name: Still mind
3.description: Gains a +2 bonus on saving throws against spells and effects from the school of enchantment.

3.name: Fast movement
3.description: A monk gains an enhancement bonus to her speed.

4.name: Ki strike (magic)
4.description: Unarmed attacks are treated as magic weapons for the purpose of dealing damage to creatures with damage reduction.

4.name: Slow fall 20 ft.
4.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

5.name: Purity of body
5.description: Gains immunity to all diseases except for supernatural and magical diseases.

6.name: Slow fall 30 ft.
6.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

7.name: Wholeness of body
7.description: Can heal her own wounds. She can heal a number of hit points of damage equal to twice her current monk level each day.

8.name: Slow fall 40 ft.
8.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

9.name: Improved evasion
9.description: Takes no damage on a successful Reflex saving throw against attacks, but henceforth she takes only half damage on a failed save.

10.name: Ki strike (lawful)
10.description: Unarmed attacks are treated as lawful weapons for the purpose of dealing damage to creatures with damage reduction.

10.name: Slow fall 50 ft.
10.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

11.name: Diamond body
11.description: Gains immunity to poisons of all kinds.

11.name: Greater flurry
11.description: Gets a second extra attack at her full base attack bonus from flurry of blows.

12.name: Abundant step
12.description: Can slip magically between spaces, as if using the spell dimension door, once per day.

12.name: Slow fall 60 ft.
12.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

13.name: Diamond soul
13.description: Gains spell resistance equal to her current monk level + 10.

14.name: Slow fall 70 ft.
14.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

15.name: Quivering palm
15.description: Can set up vibrations within the body of another creature that can thereafter be fatal if the monk so desires.

16.name: Ki strike (adamantine)
16.description: Unarmed attacks are treated as adamantine weapons for the purpose of dealing damage to creatures with damage reduction and bypassing hardness.

16.name: Slow fall 80 ft.
16.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

17.name: Timeless body
17.description: No longer takes penalties to her ability scores for aging and cannot be magically aged.

17.name: Tongue of the sun and moon
17.description: Can speak with any living creature.

18.name: Slow fall 90 ft.
18.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent.

19.name: Empty body
19.description: Gains the ability to assume an ethereal state for 1 round per monk level per day.

20.name: Perfect self
20.description: Becomes a magical creature. She is forevermore treated as an outsider rather than as a humanoid. Gains damage reduction 10/magic.

20.name: Slow fall any distance
20.description: A monk within arm’s reach of a wall can use it to slow her descent any distance without harm.

1.name: Track
1.description: A ranger gains Track as a bonus feat.

1.name: Wild empathy
1.description: A ranger can improve the attitude of an animal, or a magical beast with Intelligence 1 or 2 at a -4 penalty.

3.name: Endurance
3.description: A ranger gains Endurance as a bonus feat.

4.name: Animal companion
4.description: A ranger gains an animal companion as a druid of one-half his ranger level.

7.name: Woodland stride
7.description: Move through natural undergrowth at normal speed without damage or impairment.

8.name: Swift tracker
8.description: Track at normal speed without the usual -5 penalty, or at up to twice normal speed with only a -10 penalty.

9.name: Evasion
9.description: On a successful Reflex save against an attack that normally deals half damage, take no damage while wearing light or no armor.

13.name: Camouflage
13.description: Use the Hide skill in any sort of natural terrain, even without cover or concealment.

17.name: Hide in plain sight
17.description: Use the Hide skill in natural terrain even while being observed.

1.name: Summon familiar
1.description: A sorcerer can obtain a familiar. A character with more than one class that grants a familiar may have only one familiar at a time.
